name: Concentric Ring
description: Smooth modern mechanical line rotation track
css: .ring { width: 44px; height: 44px; border: 3px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border-top-color: #6366f1; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0.1, 0.3, 1) infinite; } @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

name: Dual Counter-Ring
description: Two high-precision layered lines spinning on opposing orbits
css: .dual-ring { width: 46px; height: 46px; border: 3px solid transparent; border-top-color: #06b6d4; border-bottom-color: #a855f7; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin-clockwise 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.5, 0.1, 0.4, 0.9) infinite; position: relative; } .dual-ring::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 4px; border: 2.5px solid transparent; border-left-color: #f43f5e; border-right-color: #f43f5e; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin-counter 0.6s linear infinite; } @keyframes spin-clockwise { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @keyframes spin-counter { to { transform: rotate(-360deg); } }

name: Fluid Velocity Dots
description: Smooth cascading bounce metric dots with organic physics styling
css: .dots { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; } .dots span { width: 10px; height: 10px; background: #fff; border-radius: 50%; animation: dots-bounce 1.1s cubic-bezier(0.62, 0.05, 0.38, 0.95) infinite; } .dots span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.15s; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); } .dots span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.3s; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); } @keyframes dots-bounce { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); } 40% { transform: translateY(-14px); } }

name: Audio Frequency Pulse
css: .bars { display: flex; gap: 5px; align-items: center; height: 32px; } .bars span { width: 5px; height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(to top, #3b82f6, #60a5fa); border-radius: 4px; transform-origin: center; animation: bar-pulse 0.9s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } .bars span:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: -0.6s; } .bars span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: -0.3s; } .bars span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: -0.45s; } .bars span:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: -0.15s; } @keyframes bar-pulse { 0% { transform: scaleY(0.2); } 100% { transform: scaleY(1); } }

name: Matrix Isometric Flip
description: 3D geometric box rotation utilizing modern depth perspectives
css: .sq-stage { perspective: 120px; } .sq { width: 34px; height: 34px; background: #10b981; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3); animation: isometric-flip 1.4s cubic-bezier(0.7, 0, 0.3, 1) infinite; } @keyframes isometric-flip { 0% { transform: rotate(0); } 50% { transform: rotateX(180deg) rotateY(0); } 100% { transform: rotateX(180deg) rotateY(180deg); } }

name: Fluid Sine Wave
description: Fluid scale metric bars representing mathematical sine functions
css: .wave { display: flex; gap: 5px; } .wave span { width: 5px; height: 30px; background: #f59e0b; border-radius: 4px; animation: sine-wave 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.445, 0.05, 0.55, 0.95) infinite; } .wave span:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: -1.2s; } .wave span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: -1.05s; } .wave span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: -0.9s; } .wave span:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: -0.75s; } .wave span:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: -0.6s; } @keyframes sine-wave { 0%, 100% { transform: scaleY(0.3); } 50% { transform: scaleY(1); } }

name: Echo Pulse Ripple
description: Dual overlapping organic echoing wavefront ripples
css: .ripple { width: 54px; height: 54px; position: relative; } .ripple span { position: absolute; inset: 0; border: 2.5px solid #ec4899; border-radius: 50%; opacity: 0; animation: wave-ripple 1.5s cubic-bezier(0.1, 0.8, 0.3, 1) infinite; } .ripple span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.75s; } @keyframes wave-ripple { 0% { transform: scale(0.1); opacity: 1; } 70% { opacity: 0.4; } 100% { transform: scale(1.3); opacity: 0; } }

name: Orbital Dash Stream
description: SVG mathematical stroke morph tracker configuration
css: .dash { width: 48px; height: 48px; animation: vector-spin 1.8s linear infinite; } .dash circle { fill: none; stroke: #6366f1; stroke-width: 4; stroke-linecap: round; animation: stroke-morph 1.4s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) infinite; } @keyframes vector-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @keyframes stroke-morph { 0% { stroke-dasharray: 1, 150; stroke-dashoffset: 0; } 50% { stroke-dasharray: 90, 150; stroke-dashoffset: -40; } 100% { stroke-dasharray: 90, 150; stroke-dashoffset: -120; } }

name: Satellite Gravity Loop
description: Kinetic mass tracking standard anchor ring path logic
css: .orbit { width: 48px; height: 48px; border: 2px dashed rgba(255,255,255,0.08); border-radius: 50%; position: relative; animation: satellite-spin 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.3, 0.1, 0.3, 1) infinite; } .sat { width: 10px; height: 10px; background: #f43f5e; border-radius: 50%; position: absolute; top: -5px; left: calc(50% - 5px); box-shadow: 0 0 10px #f43f5e; } @keyframes satellite-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

name: Quantum Spin Lattice
description: Double component phase shifter clock rendering layout
css: .fade { width: 48px; height: 48px; position: relative; } .fade::before, .fade::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 50%; border: 3.5px solid transparent; border-top-color: #38bdf8; animation: spin-fluid 0.9s cubic-bezier(0.42, 0, 0.58, 1) infinite; } .fade::after { animation-delay: -0.45s; opacity: 0.35; border-top-color: #818cf8; } @keyframes spin-fluid { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

name: Infinite Scanner Track
css: .prog-box { width: 120px; height: 4px; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; position: relative; } .prog-bar { position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; height: 100%; width: 50%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #10b981, #6ee7b7); border-radius: 4px; animation: continuous-scan 1.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1) infinite; } @keyframes continuous-scan { 0% { left: -50%; width: 30%; } 50% { width: 60%; } 100% { left: 100%; width: 30%; } }

name: Beacon Core Pulse
description: Radial expanding technical center status indicator
css: .beacon { width: 44px; height: 44px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.1); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; position: relative; } .beacon::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid #8b5cf6; opacity: 1; animation: beacon-out 1.4s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.46, 0.45, 0.94) infinite; } .core { width: 14px; height: 14px; background: #8b5cf6; border-radius: 50%; box-shadow: 0 0 12px #8b5cf6; } @keyframes beacon-out { to { transform: scale(1.5); opacity: 0; } }

name: Infinity Nexus
css: .inf-track { display: flex; gap: 12px; position: relative; } .inf-node { width: 16px; height: 16px; border-radius: 50%; background: #a855f7; animation: node-shift 1s ease-in-out infinite alternate; } .inf-node:nth-child(2) { background: #ec4899; animation-delay: -0.5s; } @keyframes node-shift { 0% { transform: scale(0.4) translateX(-10px); opacity: 0.3; } 100% { transform: scale(1.2) translateX(10px); box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.6); } }

name: Solar Eclipse Ring
description: Coronal projection glow tracking geometry layout
css: .eclipse { width: 44px; height: 44px; background: #000; border-radius: 50%; position: relative; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.03); } .eclipse::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -3px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(0deg, #f59e0b, #ef4444); z-index: -1; animation: coronal-spin 1s linear infinite; filter: blur(2px); } @keyframes coronal-spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

name: Helical Particle Stream
description: Double tracking vertical periodic phase displacement loader
css: .dna { display: flex; gap: 10px; } .dna span { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #10b981; animation: phase-shift 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.445, 0.05, 0.55, 0.95) infinite alternate; } .dna .n2 { animation-delay: -0.25s; background: #06b6d4; } .dna .n3 { animation-delay: -0.5s; background: #3b82f6; } @keyframes phase-shift { 0% { transform: translateY(-12px) scale(0.6); opacity: 0.4; } 100% { transform: translateY(12px) scale(1.2); opacity: 1; } }

name: Chamber Expansion Matrix
description: Multi-dimensional synchronized variable interval square expansion
css: .cube-grid { width: 36px; height: 36px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 4px; } .cube-grid span { background: #fff; border-radius: 3px; animation: grid-pop 1.2s ease infinite; } .cube-grid span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; background: #cbd5e1; } .cube-grid span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.4s; background: #94a3b8; } .cube-grid span:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.6s; background: #64748b; } @keyframes grid-pop { 0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } 50% { transform: scale(0.5); opacity: 0.3; } }
